identifier	chrom	start	end	querypos_p	querypos_s	leftpos_p	leftpos_s	seqpos_p	seqpos_s	mean_distance_to_end	median_distance_to_end	mean_distance_to_end_remove_clip	median_distance_to_end_remove_clip	distance_to_end_p	distance_to_end_s	distance_to_end_remove_clip_p	distance_to_end_remove_clip_s	baseq_p	baseq_s	ref_baseq1b_p	ref_baseq1b_s	alt_baseq1b_p	alt_baseq1b_s	DNAMutationType	RNAMutationType	equal_to_previous_bases	cause_ploy_alt	mapper_odds	mapper_p	ref_multi_map_prop	alt_multi_map_prop	ref_mismatches_mean	alt_mismatches_mean	mismatches_p	mismatches_s	sb_p	sb_odds	mapq_p	mapq_s	mapq_difference	dp	alt_SpotNum	alt_dp	vaf	dp_consensus	alt_dp_consensus	vaf_consensus	VDB	RPBZ	SGB	reverse_dp	forward_dp	alt_reverse_dp	alt_forward_dp	major_read_strand	ref_hardclip_prop	alt_hardclip_prop	ref_softclip_prop	alt_softclip_prop	hardclip_length_s	hardclip_length_p	hardclip_prop_odds	hardclip_prop_p	softclip_length_s	softclip_length_p	softclip_prop_odds	softclip_prop_p	indel_proportion_SNPonly	alt2_proportion	alt2_proportion_consensus	UMI_number_per_spot_s	UMI_number_per_spot_p	read_number_per_spot_s	read_number_per_spot_p	alt_UMI_consistence_prop	alt_consistence_hard_prop	alt_consistence_soft_prop	read_number_p	read_number_s	ref_read_number_perUMI_median	alt_read_number_perUMI_median	ref_read_number_perUMI_max	alt_read_number_perUMI_max	spotNum	combine_nearest_phase_haplotype	combine_nearest_info_mutant_prop	combine_nearest_discordant_prop	combine_nearest_phase_distance	no_combine_most_phase_haplotype	no_combine_most_info_mutant_prop	no_combine_most_discordant_prop	no_combine_most_phase_distance	no_combine_nearest_phase_haplotype	no_combine_nearest_info_mutant_prop	no_combine_nearest_discordant_prop	no_combine_nearest_phase_distance	combine_most_phase_haplotype	combine_most_info_mutant_prop	combine_most_discordant_prop	combine_most_phase_distance	mappabilityScore	GCcontent	gene_type	anno_gene	anno	geneStrand	distanceExon	AFind	mean_AFspot	max_AFspot	vaf_cluster_mean	vaf_clust
